_comment: The shape of config.json. You do NOT need this file: on first run the plugin detects everything and writes config.json itself. Read that file to see what it decided; edit it to override. This is here to document what the fields mean.
_port: Must match the hook URLs in .claude/settings.json. Avoid 8787 — WSL's port relay commonly squats on it.
_approvalTimeoutMs: How long a key may stay lit waiting for you. MUST be lower than the hook timeout in .claude/settings.json, or Claude Code gives up first and you get no fallback prompt.
_gateTools: Tools that require a physical key press. Everything else follows the normal permission flow. Start narrow — gating Read would light the deck constantly.
_voice_mode: "auto" (default) picks per machine on first run and writes the answer here. || "gui" = Claude Code Desktop's own dictation button, driven via UI Automation. NEEDS NOTHING INSTALLED, and covers Claude Code's 20 languages. || "local" = ffmpeg records, whisper.cpp transcribes, the text is pasted in. The only mode that speaks Chinese — and the only one that needs ffmpeg + a whisper.cpp build + a model. Audio never leaves the machine. || "cli" = terminal Claude Code: taps `key` at the focused window; needs /voice tap.
_voice_auto: How auto decides: it takes your language from Claude Code's `language` setting, or the OS locale if that is unset. If Claude Code can dictate that language it picks "gui"; if not (Chinese, Thai…) it picks "local". If local's dependencies are missing it falls back to "gui" and says so in the log — it never fails silently. Check agent-deck.log under %LOCALAPPDATA%\agent-deck to see what it chose and why.
_voice_device: local mode only. ffmpeg dshow device, detected automatically. To find it yourself: `ffmpeg -list_devices true -f dshow -i dummy`. PREFER the @device_cm_ GUID over the friendly name: friendly names are often non-ASCII and get mangled crossing shell boundaries. The backslash must be escaped as \\ in JSON. Looks like: audio=@device_cm_{GUID}\\wave_{GUID}
_voice_whisper: local mode only. Paths to an existing whisper.cpp build, detected automatically from ~/whisper.cpp. large-v3-turbo is a good speed/quality balance for Chinese. `threads` matters: whisper defaults to 4 no matter how many cores you have.
_voice_autoSubmit: true sends the prompt straight after pasting. false leaves it in the composer so you can read it first — recommended, since STT gets names and code terms wrong.
_voice_key: cli mode only. SendKeys syntax, must match voice:pushToTalk. Space = "{SPACE}"; ctrl+shift+v = "^+v".
